_protocol: Workers may ONLY flip 'passes' to true and fill 'evidence' with a real proof-artifact path or URL. Never edit id/title/acceptance. Orchestrator adds features at milestone planning.

features.title: Repo scaffold with AI-handoff state files
features.acceptance: PROJECT.md, features.json, progress.md, init.sh, docs/spec.md, docs/architecture.md, checkpoints/ exist at repo root and describe the project accurately
features.evidence: repo root @ commit HEAD: PROJECT.md, features.json, progress.md, init.sh, docs/spec.md, docs/architecture.md, checkpoints/00-foundation.md all present and accurate

features.title: Sealed sim core with deterministic RNG streams
features.acceptance: sim/ contains pure-Lua Sim with new/apply/state/snapshot/restore/state_hash; no engine APIs, os, io, or math.random anywhere under sim/ (grep clean)
features.evidence: grep clean (no defold/os/io/math.random under sim/); sim/init.lua exposes new/apply/state/snapshot/restore/state_hash; verified in CI run 29990121111 test job

features.title: Headless sim test suite passes
features.acceptance: lua5.4 tests/run_tests.lua exits 0 with >=10 passing tests covering determinism, stream independence, snapshot round-trip, intent-resolution fairness, and invalid-command safety
features.evidence: 12/12 tests pass; golden event_hash=158933364 state_hash=387435555 bit-identical on lua5.1/5.4/luajit2.0/2.1; CI test job https://github.com/tapiwamakandigona/emberdelve/actions/runs/29990121111

features.title: CI test gate green on GitHub Actions
features.acceptance: Workflow run on main: 'test' job passes on ubuntu-latest

features.title: CI produces installable debug APK
features.acceptance: Workflow run on main: 'build-android' job bundles arm64+armv7 debug APK via pinned bob.jar and uploads it as an artifact
features.evidence: build-android green, artifact emberdelve-debug-apk (ID 89150834647, 29.6MB APK, ABIs arm64-v8a+armeabi-v7a, Defold game.arcd/arci/dmanifest present): https://github.com/tapiwamakandigona/emberdelve/actions/runs/29990121111

features.title: StS-style layered node map generation
features.acceptance: sim/map.lua generates a connected layered map from the map stream; property tests: all paths reach boss, node counts within spec, same seed => same map
features.evidence: tests/map_tests.lua: 12/12 property tests over 200 seeds (connectivity both ways, all paths reach boss, layer/node bounds, elite/rest placement, determinism from fresh and mid-consumed streams); run locally lua5.4 + enforced in CI test job

features.title: Dice-builder combat v1 (10 dice variants, 3 enemies, 1 boss)
features.acceptance: Content defined as data modules under data/; headless autoplayer completes 100 seeded runs without error; win rate within 20-80% band
features.evidence: data/dice.lua (12 dice) + data/enemies.lua (4 regular, 2 elite, 1 boss); tests/content_tests.lua 21/21; tests/autoplay.lua: 100 seeded runs all terminal <=3000 cmds, 0 invalid_command, snapshot/restore twin-hash identical seeds 1..10, wins=59 losses=41 (in 20-80 band); enforced in CI test job

features.title: Full seeded run playable on device
features.acceptance: Debug APK: map -> fights -> boss -> run summary with placeholder art; manual play-through video or device log as evidence
features.evidence: OWNER-GATED: needs an on-device install/playthrough by owner. Build path ready (CI build-android job -> flutter build apk).

features.title: Autosave every action + resume
features.acceptance: Kill the app mid-fight, relaunch: game resumes into the exact pending decision; snapshot round-trip test
features.evidence: GameController autosaves sim.snapshot() to app-support JSON after every eventful apply; boot() restores non-terminal saves and routes to the phase screen. Snapshot round-trip proven headless: test/sim_test.dart 'snapshot mid-run, restore, continue => identical' (15 seeds, event+state hash identical) + autoplay twin checks.

features.title: Stack = Flutter/Dart with sealed deterministic sim library
features.acceptance: Sim runs as pure Dart (no Flutter imports); flutter test green headless; determinism preserved across the port
features.evidence: lib/sim/ is pure Dart; Lua->Dart port proven 1:1 (golden 311044885 + 100-seed hashes + twins) at pivot commit; v3 golden re-anchored 513683311. flutter test: 25 tests green.

features.title: Content scale: 30+ dice, 15+ enemies, 20+ relics, events
features.acceptance: Data-only modules; schema-validated in CI; autoplayer balance stats in band
features.evidence: 31 dice, 15 enemies, 22 relics, 16 events, 4 characters (data/*.dart, zero logic). test/content_test.dart validates schema + cross-references. Balance: 200-seed autoplay 53.5% win (band 20-80%), 0 invalids, deterministic.

features.title: Full run systems: gold, shop, events, relics, forge, rewards
features.acceptance: Shop/event/rest-forge phases reachable and resolvable; gold economy; relic hooks resolved; all in the sealed sim
features.evidence: sim v3 (SIM_VERSION=3): commands buy/leave_shop/event_choose/forge/reroll added; run_layer implements gold, shop stock (tier-gated), 16-event deck (fair: never kills), relic hook vocabulary, forge, tiered rewards. Verified by autoplay (bot uses all systems, 0 invalids) + sim_test.

features.title: Meta-progression + ascension ladder
features.acceptance: Embers bank across runs into unlocks; ascension raises difficulty; meta persists; sim stays pure (only scalar params in)
features.evidence: lib/meta/ persists embers/unlocks/best-ascension/stats (path_provider, outside sim). 4 characters unlockable via embers; endowed-progress unlock bar. Ascension = deterministic additive enemy scaling; verified monotonic (asc0 52% -> asc3 15% -> asc6 6% -> asc10 4%), test/autoplay_test.dart asserts asc6<asc0.

features.title: Full Flutter UI (UXPeak-informed) for all phases
features.acceptance: Title, character/unlock, map, combat, reward, rest/forge, shop, event, summary screens render from sim state; portrait one-thumb; design system applied
features.evidence: lib/ui/ (theme, widgets, screens) + GameController. Design tokens from docs/design-system.md (UXPeak psychology + typography laws). flutter analyze clean; widget smoke tests green (title->map, character list). Device screenshots OWNER-GATED (needs emulator/device).

features.title: CI: analyze + test gate -> Android APK artifact
features.acceptance: Workflow: flutter analyze + flutter test pass, then flutter build apk uploads artifact
features.evidence: CI run 30004629450 (commit 2ed37a1) fully green: 'Analyze + test (headless)' success (flutter analyze + 25/25 tests), 'Build Android debug APK' success -> artifact emberdelve-debug-apk (89.2MB, not expired). https://github.com/tapiwamakandigona/emberdelve/actions/runs/30004629450
